tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]           [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]Cm[/ch]
Oh, I'm sorry,     sorry that you love me (Ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]             [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]           [ch]Cm[/ch]
Changed my mind up  like it's origami[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]Cm[/ch]
Oh, I'm sorry, sorry that you love me (Ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]     [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]       N.C.
Changed my mind up like it's origami[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                  [ch]Gm7[/ch]          [ch]Dm7[/ch]            [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
(Kiss-kiss-kiss-) Kisses to my exes who don't give a shit about me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]      [ch]Gm7[/ch]           [ch]Dm7[/ch]                 [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]Cm[/ch]
Kisses, kisses to the next ones who think they can live without me[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Gm7[/ch]              [ch]Dm7[/ch]                 [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                      [ch]Cm[/ch]
We make up, then we break up, then they swear they'll never call me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Gm7[/ch]                [ch]Dm7[/ch]              [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]    [ch]Cm[/ch]           N.C.
But I still keep their number and their necklace, kisses to my exes[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab]              [ch]Gm7[/ch]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Happens every time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                      [ch]Cm[/ch]                  [ch]Gm7[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
I don't mean, mean to be cold, but that's how I get,    oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]            [ch]Gm7[/ch]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Me and all my pride[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]               [ch]Cm[/ch]                 [ch]Gm7[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch]     [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
Tryna burn down every damn bridge any time we can,    and again[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]       N.C.         [ch]Gm7[/ch]            [ch]Dm7[/ch]         [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
I'm a, I'm a, I'm a wild ride that never stops[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Cm[/ch]           [ch]Gm7[/ch]            [ch]Dm7[/ch]          [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
I'm a, I'm a, I'm a hard case they can't unlock[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Cm[/ch]            [ch]Gm7[/ch]              [ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
And I, and I swear I care a lot, just not enough[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]                [ch]Gm7[/ch]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
Let's just say it is what it is and was what it was[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                  [ch]Gm7[/ch]          [ch]Dm7[/ch]            [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
(Kiss-kiss-kiss-) Kisses to my exes who don't give a shit about me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]      [ch]Gm7[/ch]           [ch]Dm7[/ch]                 [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]Cm[/ch]
Kisses, kisses to the next ones who think they can live without me[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Gm7[/ch]              [ch]Dm7[/ch]                 [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                      [ch]Cm[/ch]
We make up, then we break up, then they swear they'll never call me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Gm7[/ch]                [ch]Dm7[/ch]              [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]    N.C.         [ch]Gm7[/ch]
But I still keep their number and their necklace, kisses to my exes[/tab]

[Post-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]Cm[/ch]
Oh, I'm sorry, sorry that you love me (Ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]     [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]             [ch]Cm[/ch]
Changed my mind up like it's origami[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]Cm[/ch]
Oh, I'm sorry, sorry that you love me (Ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]     [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]     N.C.
Changed my mind up like it's ori-[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]N.C.             [ch]Gm7[/ch]                     [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Say, say I wanna go there, then I wanna leave[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]Cm[/ch]
Make another promise that I can't keep[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Gm7[/ch]                    [ch]Dm7[/ch]
I don't ever know what I want, but that's what you want[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]           N.C.
If you're down, well, then don't blame me[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Gm7[/ch]            [ch]Dm7[/ch]              [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]       [ch]Cm[/ch]
Breakin' it all before it starts, makin' it all up in my head[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Gm7[/ch]             [ch]Dm7[/ch]            [ch]Gm7[/ch]
But I just overshare 'bout things I never meant[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]       N.C.         [ch]Gm7[/ch]            [ch]Dm7[/ch]         [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
I'm a, I'm a, I'm a wild ride that never stops[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Cm[/ch]           [ch]Gm7[/ch]            [ch]Dm7[/ch]          [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
I'm a, I'm a, I'm a hard case they can't unlock[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Cm[/ch]            [ch]Gm7[/ch]              [ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
And I, and I swear I care a lot, just not enough[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]                [ch]Gm7[/ch]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
Let's just say it is what it is and was what it was[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]          [ch]Dm7[/ch]            [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
Kisses to my exes who don't give a shit about me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]      [ch]Gm7[/ch]           [ch]Dm7[/ch]                 [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]Cm[/ch]
Kisses, kisses to the next ones who think they can live without me[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Gm7[/ch]              [ch]Dm7[/ch]                 [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                      [ch]Cm[/ch]
We make up, then we break up, then they swear they'll never call me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Gm7[/ch]                [ch]Dm7[/ch]              [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]    N.C.         [ch]Gm7[/ch]
But I still keep their number and their necklace, kisses to my exes[/tab]

[Post-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]Cm[/ch]
Oh, I'm sorry, sorry that you love me (Ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]     [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]           [ch]Cm[/ch]
Changed my mind up like it's origami[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]Cm[/ch]
Oh, I'm sorry, sorry that you love me (Ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]     [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]           [ch]Cm[/ch]
Changed my mind up like it's origami[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]          [ch]Dm7[/ch]          [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Cm[/ch]
Kisses to my exes, I know that I did you dirty[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]               [ch]Dm7[/ch]               [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]           [ch]Cm[/ch]
Little messed up, little selfish, we ain't married, I ain't thirty[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Gm7[/ch]                 [ch]Dm7[/ch]             [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]          [ch]Cm[/ch]
Yeah, we hooked up, then we broke up, then I said you really hurt me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Gm7[/ch]               [ch]Dm7[/ch]            [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]    [ch]Cm[/ch]           N.C.
But I still got your number and your necklace, kisses to my exes[/tab]
